title: Salty-Dense Tunisian Butter Stir-fry
description: A decadent low-carb dish featuring salted butter cooked sous-vide and served in a flavorful sauce with vegetables for a sick-day meal.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add salted butter and melt it.
Add chopped onions and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and bell peppers, cooking for an additional 3-4 minutes.
Pour in chicken broth or water, increase heat to bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let it thicken into a sauce. Stir occasionally until desired consistency is reached (about 15 minutes).
Serve hot over steamed vegetables if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
